'''[[Jocell]]''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] designated as '''Twin Four''' and one of wingmates of [[Jagged Fel]] during the [[Battle of Esfandia]]. She was a member of [[Vanguard Squadron (Hapes)|Vanguard Squadron]] and [[Twin Suns Squadron]] for a brief time.

{{Char-stub}}
